My Projects

A selection of projects showcasing my work in cloud infrastructure, automation, and modern DevOps practices.

Cloud Landing Zone Automation
Designed and implemented a standardized Azure landing zone using Terraform, incorporating security best practices and reducing deployment times by 40%. Automated network and firewall configurations.
Azure
Terraform
Security
Automation
Networking
Details (Internal)
High-Availability ECS Deployment
Architected and deployed a multi-region, high-availability solution on Amazon ECS for a critical client application, ensuring fault tolerance and business continuity using Terraform.
AWS
ECS
Terraform
High Availability
Architecture
Details (Internal)
Microservices Deployment on AKS
Containerized .NET microservices using Docker and deployed them onto Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) using Helm charts. Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps for automated deployments.
Azure
AKS
Kubernetes
Docker
Helm
CI/CD
.NET
Details (Internal)
Observability Dashboard Implementation
Developed real-time monitoring dashboards using Grafana and Prometheus for critical Azure services, significantly improving system observability and reducing incident response time.
Azure
Grafana
Prometheus
Monitoring
Observability
Details (Internal)
GenAI Terraform Module Generator
Developed a proof-of-concept Generative AI solution (using OpenAI wrapper) to automatically generate Terraform modules based on internal GitHub repository patterns, reducing boilerplate code.
GenAI
OpenAI
Python
Terraform
Automation
POC
Details (Internal)
Crossplane & ArgoCD Integration
Integrated Crossplane with ArgoCD for declarative, GitOps-driven management of cloud infrastructure (Azure resources) alongside application deployments within Kubernetes.

Crossplane
ArgoCD
